overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a female character walking through an arid industrial area with beige warehouse buildings under a clear blue sky. The character approaches a large warehouse, walks along its side, and continues toward distant industrial structures in an open desert environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across rocky desert terrain toward a large beige warehouse building

entered.detail: large rectangular industrial building with beige stucco walls and dark windows
tall green trees rising behind the warehouse building
arid ground covered with rocks, dirt, and sparse dry vegetation
long low industrial buildings visible on the horizon
low green bushes scattered across the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an open desert industrial yard with rocky ground and sparse shrubs. A large beige warehouse building with tall trees behind it dominates the center of the view, while distant white warehouse structures are visible on the horizon under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: alongside warehouse wall with industrial doors

events.description: character turns right to follow the corner of the warehouse building

agents.ego_description: walking along the side of the warehouse building and turning the corner to walk away from it

entered.detail: large industrial metal roll-up door on the warehouse wall
rows of small rectangular windows on the warehouse facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the beige warehouse wall, revealing industrial details like metal roll-up doors and small windows. The tall trees behind the building disappear from view as the character turns the corner, with distant white warehouses becoming visible ahead across the open yard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial yard with distant warehouse complex

agents.ego_description: walking away from the warehouse across the open desert toward a distant white warehouse complex

segments.scene_description: Having left the beige warehouse behind, the character walks across the expansive rocky desert toward a large white warehouse complex in the distance. The terrain remains arid with scattered shrubs, and mountains are visible on the far horizon under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an arid industrial yard that transitions from a close encounter with a single warehouse to a wide expanse of desert. It begins with the character walking across rocky ground toward a large beige warehouse framed by tall trees, with distant white structures visible on the horizon under a clear blue sky. As the character moves closer, the view shifts to follow the length of the beige wall, passing metal roll-up doors and small windows until the trees disappear from sight. The scene then opens up as the character turns the corner and leaves the building behind, moving across the expansive, shrub-dotted terrain. Finally, the camera tracks the character's progress toward a large white warehouse complex, with distant mountains appearing on the far horizon under the bright midday sun.
